name_local: Piazza San Marco e Basilica di San Marco

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è l'ingresso principale della basilica, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH leen-GRES-so preen-chee-PAH-leh DEL-lah bah-ZEE-lee-kah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Dal lato della piazza, fila lì.
likely_response.pronunciation: DAHL LAH-toh DEHL-lah pee-AHTS-tsah FEE-lah LÌ
likely_response.translation_en: From the square side, queue there.

responses.english: From the square side, queue there.
responses.phonetic: DAHL LAH-toh DEHL-lah pee-AHTS-tsah FEE-lah LÌ
responses.local: Dal lato della piazza, fila lì.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, c'è un codice di abbigliamento per entrare, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, cheh oon KOH-dee-cheh dee ab-bee-lya-MEN-toh per en-TRAH-reh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Spalle e ginocchia devono essere coperte.
likely_response.pronunciation: SPAHL-leh EH jee-nohkch-EE-ah deh-VOH-noh eh-SSEH-reh koh-PEHR-teh
likely_response.translation_en: Shoulders and knees must be covered.

responses.english: Shoulders and knees must be covered.
responses.phonetic: SPAHL-leh EH jee-nohkch-EE-ah deh-VOH-noh eh-SSEH-reh koh-PEHR-teh
responses.local: Spalle e ginocchia devono essere coperte.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, a che ora apre la basilica, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, ah keh OH-rah AH-preh lah bah-ZEE-lee-kah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: The hours are posted at the entrance.

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si acquistano i biglietti per la torre, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see ah-kwee-STAH-noh ee bee-LYET-tee per lah TOR-reh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket office, right of entrance.

responses.english: At the ticket office, right of entrance.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è il vaporetto più vicino, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH eel vah-po-RET-toh pyoo vee-CHEE-noh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: San Marco Vallaresso, cinque minuti a piedi.
likely_response.pronunciation: SAHN MAHR-koh vahl-lah-REH-ssoh cheen-KW-eh mee-NOO-tee AH pee-EH-dee
likely_response.translation_en: San Marco Vallaresso, five minutes walk.

responses.english: San Marco Vallaresso, five minutes walk.
responses.phonetic: SAHN MAHR-koh vahl-lah-REH-ssoh cheen-KW-eh mee-NOO-tee AH pee-EH-dee
responses.local: San Marco Vallaresso, cinque minuti a piedi.
